title: How to get rid of count categorie on chart widget
excerpt: On a busy (both line diagram and bar) chart widget I not only see all Y axis columns I selected, but it also shows a ‘count’ on most charts. Deactivation only works every time I open the dashboard, I want to permanently …

posts.author: khutchman (Karen Hutchman)
posts.cookedHtml: On a busy (both line diagram and bar) chart widget I not only see all Y axis columns I selected, but it also shows a ‘count’ on most charts. Deactivation only works every time I open the dashboard, I want to permanently filter out or delete that line/bar from all chart widgets.
